property.name: Four Haus Residence
property.amenitiesLevel: There is no amenties in this building

home.popup: Four Haus Residnece

steps.title: Step 1 – Navigate to the lockbox location
steps.text:
Lockbox Location
  • Proceed to Harwood Lane, Pyrmont NSW 2009, to the right of Bunn Street The lockbox is located on one of the fence posts

steps.title: Step 2 – Collect the access cards from the lockbox
steps.text:
Please open the lockbox labelled '4H' with the passcode provided in the message.
  • You should be able to see 2 key cards in the lockbox.
  • Please close the lockbox and jumble up the code.

steps.title: Step 3 – Walk forward towards building B.
steps.text:
After collecting the keys, walk forward 10m towards building B.
Look for Building B, Unit 24-47.
Your apartment is UNIT 45 , LEVEL 7

steps.title: Step 4 – Scan the access card on the scanner
steps.text:
• Scan the access card provided on the scanner and wait for beep sound and green light
  • Push the door open and walk towards the lift

steps.title: Step 5 – Enter the lift and scan your access card on the lift scanner
steps.text:
• Hold your access card against the scanner for 2 seconds and wait for the beep sound
  • Press the Level 7 button. You are on Level 7, Unit 45
  • Welcome to Four Haus Residence!

steps.title: Step 1 – Navigate to the lockbox location
steps.text:
Lockbox Location
  • Proceed to Harwood Lane, Pyrmont NSW 2009, to the right of Bunn Street The lockbox is located on one of the fence posts
  • Stop your car safelty on the left side of the road

steps.title: Step 2 – Collect the keys from the lockbox
steps.text:
Please open the lockbox labelled '4H' with the passcode provided in the message.
  • You should be able to see 2 key cards in the lockbox.
  • Please close the lockbox and jumble up the code.

steps.title: Step 3 – Drive forward 50m and look for the entrance to the parking garage on the left
steps.text:
• Scan the key card provided on the scanner and wait for the gate to open
  • Drive down the ramp. Parking is located on Level P1, the first level upon entry.
  • Turn left when reaching the intersection.
  • You should be able to see parking spot 45 on your right-hand side.

steps.title:
Step 4 – Take the lift located to the left of the parking.
DO NOT take the lift in front of your parking spot
steps.text:
• Walk past the rubbish bins and head to the lift labeled Building B (Units 24–47)
  • You are located on Level 7, Unit 45
  • Hold the access card on the reader for 1 second until you hear a beep, then press Level 7.
  • Once you exit the lift, the unit is on your right.

steps.title: Step 5 – Enter the lift and scan your key card on the lift scanner
steps.text:
• Hold your access card against the scanner for two seconds and wait for the beep sound
  • Press the Level 7 button. You are on Level 7, Unit 45
  • Welcome to Four Haus Residence!

steps.title:
Shortcut to ICC/Lightrail and Darling Square
Step 1 – Walk towards Novotel Hotel
steps.text:
• When you exit the apartment, make a right turn and walk towards Bunn Street
  • Turn left and walk towards Novotel Hotel direction which is across the road

steps.title: Step 2 – Walk into Novotel Hotel
steps.text: Walk into Novotel Hotel pick up and drop off area

steps.title: Step 3 – Walk through the hotel and towards the parking lot
steps.text: Walk around the hotel to the carpark area. Do not enter the hotel. You will see signs to the lightrail

steps.title: Step 4 – Walk along the pathway
steps.text: Walk along the pathway and you will see a flight of stairs at the end

steps.title: Step 5 – Walk down the stairs and you will see the lifts on your left
steps.text: Take the lift down to level 1. You are on Level 4.

steps.title: Step 6 – Turn left when exiting the lift and you will see the light rail station.
steps.text: Once you exit the lift, turn left and follow signs to the light rail station.

steps.title: Step 7 – Walk towards ICC/ Take the light rail to the city
steps.text:
Cross the track to the other side of the to take the lightrail to the city.
If you are walking to darling harbour/ICC, cross the tracks and traffic lights and walk towards ICC direction.

houseRules: No partying or loud music are allowed in the apartment.
Please keep the access cards safe and respect building rules.
Please keep the volume down after 10:00 PM.
A fee of $200 will be charged for the replacement of each access card and remote.
